docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FROM PLAINTIFF TO AMEND DEFENDANT'S NAME AND PRAYER AMOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHUANG, QINGHUA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY ZHUANG, QINGHUA AS TO DEFENDANT DEMEE, CAMILLA M
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-01-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEMEE, CAMILLA M
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ZHUANG, QINGHUA AS TO DEFENDANT DEMEE, CAMILLA M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF QINGHUA ZHUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAMILLA M. DEE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHUANG, QINGHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMEE, CAMILLA M $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00, DEFENDANT MUST REFUND SECURITY DEPOSIT TENDERED BY PLAINTIFF WHEN PLAINTIFF DECIDED NOT TO RENT APARTMENT AND INFORMED DEFENDANT OF THIS DECISION VERBALY AND IN WRITING ON THE DATE DEPOSIT WAS TENDERED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
